name: Entry hall
description: Formal entrance / foyer that mediates between outside and the rest of the house. Floor in @floor, perimeter walls in @primary with an @accent lintel ring (open ceiling so a roof skill can stack on top). The south wall hosts a 1x2 door OPENING (just air — the door_with_frame skill places the actual door elsewhere). Interior fittings: a 3-tall @fence coat rack crowned by a minecraft:wall_torch (proxy for hanging hooks), a 3-block @stairs sitting bench facing the door, a minecraft:flower_pot on a small @primary pedestal, a @carpet welcome mat at the threshold, and a minecraft:lantern on the wall.

required_furniture.rule: 1-wide x 2-tall gap in the south wall; never place the door block itself — door_with_frame handles that.
3-tall column of @fence against the west interior wall near the door, with a minecraft:wall_torch on top as a hooks proxy.
Row of 3 @stairs against the north interior wall, facing south (into the room, toward the door).
Mounted near the lintel on the east wall, opposite the coat rack; bigger halls get a second lantern on the west wall for balance.
Sits on a single @primary pedestal block in the east interior corner near the door, opposite the coat rack.
Single @carpet block on the floor one cell inside the door opening.

placement_rules: Door opening (never an actual door block) centered in the south wall
Flower-pot pedestal in the corner opposite the coat rack so the foyer reads as symmetric
Lantern near the lintel on the wall opposite the coat rack
lighting_ventilation: Daylight enters through the door opening; primary interior light is the lantern on the east wall, supported by the wall_torch crowning the coat rack. The open lintel ceiling lets a roof skill cap the hall while allowing the lantern light to wash up the @accent ring.

medieval.notes: Heavy oak panelling, stone-brick lintel, red welcome rug, oak fence coat rack with iron wall torch.

modern.notes: Bright quartz foyer, iron-bar coat rack reading as a minimalist hook stand, gray entry mat, stone bench.

fantasy.notes: Dark-oak foyer with purpur lintel, dark-oak coat rack and bench, purple welcome rug — fits a wizard's tower or guild hall.
